Labels for this repository

Suggested labels and colors (create via Issues → Labels → New label):

- bug — #d73a4a
- enhancement — #a2eeef
- help wanted — #008672
- good first issue — #7057ff
- needs-triage — #fbca04
- duplicate — #cfd3d7
- question — #d876e3

How to create labels via the GitHub UI
1. Go to your repository on GitHub.
2. Click "Issues" → "Labels".
3. Click "New label" and fill Name and Color. Paste the hex color from the list above.
4. Repeat for each suggested label.

If you’d like, I can create these labels for you automatically — confirm and I will proceed.
